title: cheirostylis yei
intro: Cheirostylis yei, also known as the Golden Cheirostylis, is a type of flowering plant in the family Aristolochiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues, including coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Cheirostylis yei is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
